description: Present a citable accessible public dashboard with bounded review evidence.

gates.evidence: Hosted run 30014543059 passed 64 tests across 11 routes and four browser projects with 44 attributable screenshots. The accountable owner approved automated packet baf26fcdf1855447de472caa81d1418a3a8e3203fc54bbcf117ef3a08c211f3c and owner packet acfa8a605d88f1385a1672fc1852999dd2a35cff9caf207d9805a7c8a2e0ba96 within the declared visual, automated accessibility and provenance scope. Manual VoiceOver and universal WCAG conformance are excluded.
